archetype: Archetype 7: Electric & Neon (Premium Dark SaaS Variant, Linear/Vapi Inspired)

fonts.install_command: Use Google Fonts via next/font/google or standard HTML link tags.

heading_rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-light to font-medium text-white

layout_spacing.dashboard_grid: The 'Control Room' Grid - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, tight gaps (gap-4/gap-6), 100% utilization of viewport space. Override default stretch with flex/grid alignment where necessary.
layout_spacing.marketing_grid: The 'Bento' Grid - asymmetrical, overlapping, gap-8 to gap-12. Never fill 100% perfectly, leave breathing room.
layout_spacing.container_padding: CRITICAL: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.

surfaces_and_effects.cards: Flat background (#121214), max 8px radius (rounded-md/rounded-lg), 1px border (border-white/10), no heavy default shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), border highlight to white/20 or cyan/30.
surfaces_and_effects.glow_effects: Use subtle cyan radial gradients behind hero sections or active elements (e.g., radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%, rgba(0,240,255,0.15), transparent 50%)). Avoid full screen generic gradients.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00F0FF] text-black font-medium hover:bg-[#00F0FF]/90 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.4)] transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-300

components_strategy.forms_inputs: Shadcn based. Dark backgrounds (#0A0A0A), white/10 borders. Focus states MUST have cyan rings: focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00F0FF]/50 focus:border-[#00F0FF].
components_strategy.tables_lists: Minimalist design. border-b border-white/5 for rows. hover:bg-white/[0.02] on rows. Use pill badges for statuses.
components_strategy.navigation: Sticky top nav. Glassmorphism background. Text-based logo with cyan glow (text-white drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,240,255,0.8)] font-bold).
components_strategy.charts: Shadcn charts or Recharts. Use cyan (#00F0FF) and deep blue (#0066FF) for data lines/bars. Remove grid lines or make them very faint (white/5).
components_strategy.icons: Use lucide-react (standard Shadcn) or @phosphor-icons/react for a more technical look.
components_strategy.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, links) MUST include a data-testid attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

motion_animations.page_transitions: Subtle fade and slide up on mount (initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}, animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}).
motion_animations.micro_interactions: Hover states on all interactive elements. Buttons scale slightly down on active (scale: 0.98). Use layoutId for tab switching indicators.

hero_background.instruction: Do not use a stock image. Create an ultra-premium tech feel using a dark background (#0A0A0A) with a CSS radial glow at the top center: 'radial-gradient(circle at 50% -20%, rgba(0,240,255,0.15), rgba(0,0,0,0) 60%)'. Add an SVG grid pattern overlay with 2px stroke and 5% opacity for structure.

image_urls.description: Professional corporate man, use for testimonials or lead list avatars
Professional corporate woman, use for testimonials or lead list avatars
Modern clinic building, use to represent 'Appointment Booking' use case in Marketing section

specific_page_instructions.landing_page: High impact hero with cyan glow text logo (Manolle AI). Bento grid for features showcasing Real Estate & Clinic use cases equally. Call to action should be clear. Use Framer Motion for scroll reveal.
specific_page_instructions.auth: Centered glassmorphic card over dark void with cyan ambient light behind it. Minimal fields. Include standard options (Login, Signup, Forgot Password).
specific_page_instructions.dashboard_overview: 4 top stat cards (Calls Completed, Minutes Used, Leads Contacted, Appointments Booked). 2 main layout sections: Call Volume Chart (wide, left) & Recent Activity feed (narrow, right).
specific_page_instructions.ai_agents_management: Grid of agent cards. Each card has active/inactive toggle switch. Status dot (green for active, red for inactive). Use 'Tracing Beam' or subtle border glow effect for active agents.
specific_page_instructions.campaigns: Table or list of campaigns showing status (running, paused), progress bars for completion, and quick actions.
specific_page_instructions.leads_import: CSV Import UI with a dashed border dropzone and hover state. Lead preview table below with status indicators (Valid, Error, Duplicate).
specific_page_instructions.call_history: Data-dense table with sticky header. Include duration, status pill badges (Completed/Failed/Voicemail), and a placeholder for transcript view. Search and filter inputs above table.
specific_page_instructions.calendar: Clean calendar view with appointment slots. Sidebar for 'Upcoming Meetings' with cyan left-border accents for today's items.
specific_page_instructions.analytics: Dedicated analytics page with multiple Shadcn/Recharts showing call success rates, appointment conversion, etc.
specific_page_instructions.settings_billing: Profile and Company form fields. Billing section shows 3 Razorpay plans in a bento format. Highlight the middle 'Pro' tier with a cyan border and subtle glow.

technical_constraints.file_extensions: Use .js and .jsx files instead of .ts/.tsx as per constraints.
technical_constraints.auth: Supabase placeholder/structure for auth. Postgre database schema design in mind.
technical_constraints.responsive: Mobile-first approach. Ensure tables scroll horizontally on mobile. Change grids to 1 column on small screens.
